overview: NOCTURNE is an ultra-premium dark luxury fashion brand website competing at the level of Saint Laurent, Prada, and Gucci. Features a cinematic logo splash screen on first visit, parallax hero, 33+ products across 6 curated sections, and premium micro-animations throughout.
features: Full-screen animated logo splash on first visit with ambient light effects
Dark luxury design with platinum accents and Instrument Serif editorial typography
33+ products organized in 6 sections: Menswear, Womenswear, Accessories, Evening Wear, Outerwear, New Arrivals
Parallax cinematic hero with CSS scroll effect
Clickable product cards with image zoom and magnetic hover
Full product detail pages with sticky gallery and size/color selectors
Lookbook editorial spreads and celebrity collaborations
Minimal geometric NOCTURNE logo mark in navigation
